articles.title: When will social media ban start and what platforms are included?

articles.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
articles.description: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been found guilty of two counts of rape and given four years in jail.
